englishDefinitions: A specific idea, proposal, or comment that someone placed in a suggestion box.
A suggestion submitted for others to consider.
persianTranslation: نظر یا پیشنهادی که در صندوق پیشنهادات گذاشته شده
examples: The suggestion in the box said we should start work an hour later.
Nobody knew who wrote the suggestion in the box.
The manager read the suggestion in the box during the meeting.
